title: Recipes of the Lost
description: Just a simple mod that adds a few recipes to uncraftable items
body:
# Recipes of the Lost

Recipes of the Lost is a Minecraft mod designed to unlock the crafting potential of overlooked items in the game. Have you ever wished you could craft that elusive mob drop, obscure block, or uncraftable item sitting in your inventory? With Recipes of the Lost, you'll gain access to a variety of thoughtfully balanced crafting recipes for items that previously lacked them, seamlessly integrating them into your gameplay.

This mod doesn't just fill in the gaps—it enhances your crafting experience while respecting Minecraft's natural progression. Whether you're a survivalist looking to thrive or a builder seeking easier access to rare materials, Recipes of the Lost offers a creative solution to make the uncraftable, craftable.

### Notes

**This is my first “mod” and I’m not just doing an easy test of my skills as a creator.** I hope that anyone who downloads this mod enjoys the recipes, but please do not hesitate to ask questions, give suggestions or let me know of any problems. Have fun crafting!
